title: centaurium pulchellum var. affine
intro: Centaurium pulchellum var. affine, also known as the greater centaury, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and iridoid glycoside compounds. The health benefits of Centaurium pulchellum var. affine include reducing fever and inflammation, and it has been used to treat a variety of ailments, such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
